description: Counts registered passenger cars first registered at or before a cutoff year. Use when user asks older-than-N-years counts. Year-based, not exact day-level.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" | EVAL first_registration_year_clean = CASE(_foerste_registrering_aar >= 1900 AND _foerste_registrering_aar <= DATE_EXTRACT("year", NOW()), _foerste_registrering_aar, null), matches_age_threshold = first_registration_year_clean <= ?max_first_registration_year | STATS matching_car_count = COUNT(*) WHERE matches_age_threshold, registered_car_count = COUNT(*), oldest_first_registration_year = MIN(first_registration_year_clean), newest_matching_first_registration_year = MAX(CASE(matches_age_threshold, first_registration_year_clean, null)) | EVAL matching_share_pct = ROUND(matching_car_count * 100.0 / registered_car_count, 1) | LIMIT 1

max_first_registration_year.description: Maximum first-registration year included in the count. For example, for 'more than 10 years old' during 2026, use 2015 because year-only data cannot prove whether 2016 cars have passed their exact registration anniversary.
